_deprecated.why: Claude Code's OFFICIAL, doc-verified hook config surface is settings.json 'hooks' (PascalCase events: SessionStart, Stop, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, UserPromptSubmit, …) in a three-level event -> matcher -> hooks[] shape. See skills/g-skl-platform-claude/PLATFORM_SPEC.md Section 6/9 and SKILL.md (verified 2026-06-02 against https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks). The previous top-level hooks.json was a Cursor-era surface that may silently not fire on Claude Code; 'beforeShellExecution' had no Claude Code equivalent and was remapped to a PreToolUse 'Bash|Shell|...' matcher. T420 migrated the verified-firing entries to settings.json and retired this file to remove the two-competing-surfaces ambiguity flagged in PLATFORM_SPEC_Claude.md §9 gap #2.
_deprecated.history: T1462/T1487 documented and annotated the gap; the shape was corrected in place (PascalCase, matcher-grouped); T420 completed the consolidation by moving the wiring into settings.json and reducing this file to a pointer.
_deprecated.hook_md_contract: T1171: each hook script ('g-hk-<name>.py' / '.ps1') has a companion '.md' self-description at the same path (e.g. '.claude/hooks/g-hk-session-start.md'). The companion path is derivable from the script name; the official settings.json hook schema has no '_hook_md' key, so the reference is path-derived rather than inlined. Use '/g-create-hook <hook-name> <event>' to scaffold a new script+md pair and wire it into settings.json.
_deprecated.gald3r_lifecycle_events: T1055: in addition to the harness-native events wired in settings.json, gald3r defines four gald3r-internal lifecycle events ('pre_skill', 'post_skill', 'pre_session', 'post_session'). Claude Code does NOT expose native skill-boundary or gald3r-session-boundary events, so these are dispatched by the gald3r skill/command runner (or fired manually) and are NOT auto-wired anywhere. Reference example hooks: 'g-hk-pre-skill-timing', 'g-hk-post-skill-timing', 'g-hk-pre-session-trace', 'g-hk-post-session-trace'.
